response.justification: Wei Chen brings genuine geospatial domain experience through founding GISCollective and building GIS applications, plus proven low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests per second. However, the role requires modern C++ or Rust as the primary language, and his C++ exposure is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments a decade ago, with recent years spent primarily in TypeScript/Node.js product work. There is no direct routing or navigation-systems experience, making the fit uncertain despite strong adjacent skills.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial data platform experience (GISCollective founder, Green Map GIS apps, FOSS4G speaker)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems background using async I/O, fibers, and caching at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, and Linux proficiency
concerns: Minimal modern C++ experience (short 2014-2015 role) and no Rust background
No direct experience with routing engines, navigation guidance, or map tile pipelines
Recent focus on TypeScript/Node full-stack product work, away from systems-level development
